revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = year missing | title = Please supply at least a "|year=" of publication if not a full "|date=", or use "|year=year unspecified" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = <!--[[Category:All articles with broken citations]]--> | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = year missing | title = Please supply at least a "|year=" of publication if not a full "|date=", or use "|year=year unspecified" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = <!----> | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with broken citations]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = year missing | title = Please supply at least a "|year=" of publication if not a full "|date=", or use "|year=year unspecified" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = <!----> | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:All articles with broken citations]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = year missing | title = Please supply at least a "|year=" of publication if not a full "|date=", or use "|year=year unspecified" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles with broken citations]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
